message.content:
@startuml
title Validation Tocken

participant "RemoteServiceServlet" as R
participant "HttpSessionCollector" as H
participant "SysLog" as S
participant "Validation_User" as V

R -> R : Data Request
R -> R : Get Session ID_client
R -> H : Get Session by ID_client
H --> R : Session
R -> R : Validation Tockens
R -> R : True
R -> V : Access success
R -> R : Validation Tockens
R -> R : False
R -> S : Tocken Failure (Name, Time)
R -> R : Access denied

@enduml
